analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of trigger.dev/docs crawled 214 pages with 100.47% crawl coverage across 216 discovered URLs. 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links were identified, all within user-facing docs (0 repository links). API reference coverage is complete at 100% across 9 detected API pages. SEO/geo issue rate is elevated at 14.84%, and overall audit confidence stands at 84.83%.
strengths: Complete API reference coverage at 100% with 9 API pages successfully detected
Excellent freshness tracking with 99.53% of pages showing last-updated metadata
High crawl coverage at 100.47% indicating comprehensive site discovery
No repository navigation link breakage (0 repo_broken_links_count)
risks: 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation experience
SEO/geo issue rate of 14.84% may impact discoverability and search rankings
1 unverified link due to auth/rate-limit/server blocks creates uncertainty in link health
Overall audit confidence at 84.83% indicates moderate uncertainty in findings
Links confidence at 78.33% is lowest confidence dimension, suggesting link validation challenges
Example reliability at 88.89% means approximately 1 in 9 code examples may have issues
Multi-project topology mode may mask project-specific documentation gaps

prioritized_actions.action: Fix 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Investigate and resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 14.84% of pages to improve discoverability
Review and fix the 1 unverified link blocked by auth/rate-limit/server constraints
Audit and repair code examples with reliability below 90% threshold
Implement automated link checking in CI/CD to prevent future broken link regressions

limitations: External audit cannot verify links behind authentication, rate limits, or server blocks (1 URL unverified)
Crawl-based analysis cannot guarantee accuracy of code examples in production environments or validate runtime behavior
SEO/geo issue detection relies on heuristics and may not reflect actual search engine ranking factors or regional performance
Multi-project topology mode may obscure project-specific documentation completeness or version-specific gaps
Confidence scores reflect detection reliability but cannot guarantee absence of undiscovered issues in dynamic or gated content
